settings.heading:
Good ingredients aren't enough.
They have to work.
settings.subheading: We started with one conviction: that the best supplement ingredients in the world could work even harder. Three decades of physics research later, we proved it.

settings.statement: To enhance human performance and longevity by making every ingredient work at its full biological potential.

settings.title: Outcomes before technology
settings.description: We measure success by what you feel and what the tests show — not by how impressive the science sounds.

settings.title: Proof over promise
settings.description: Every claim is backed by university-led, randomized, placebo-controlled trials published in peer-reviewed journals.

settings.title: Nothing that doesn't help you
settings.description: No fillers, no excipients, no binders. If an ingredient doesn't benefit the body, it has no place in the capsule.

settings.section_heading: From billion-dollar businesses to the science of human potential.
settings.letter_body:
Jirka Rysavy built some of Colorado's most consequential companies. Corporate Express grew to $4.7 billion in revenue before being acquired by Staples. Crystal Market became Wild Oats — the organic food retailer later acquired by Whole Foods. He then founded Gaia Inc. (NASDAQ: GAIA), a global streaming platform for conscious media and personal growth.

Each company shared the same thread: a belief that how we consume — food, information, energy — profoundly shapes human performance. Igniton is the culmination of that belief, applied at the molecular level.

After decades of interest in advanced physics research on subatomic quasi-particles, Jirka saw the opportunity to apply that science to human nutrition. The result wasn't a new ingredient — it was a new way of making existing, proven ingredients work harder inside the body.

settings.label: Years of physics research behind the enhancement process
Fillers, excipients, or binders in any Igniton formula
Memory improvement measured in the IgniCognition clinical trial

settings.section_title:
Not just what's in it.
What's been done to it.

settings.title: Enhanced, not just formulated
settings.description: Every ingredient is processed through cold plasma and laser-photonics technology to increase cellular bioavailability — shown to outperform the same ingredients in unenhanced form.

settings.title: University tested, not self-reported
settings.description: Results come from randomized, placebo-controlled trials published in peer-reviewed academic journals — not from internal surveys or anecdotal claims.

settings.icon_svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M13 10V3L4 14h7v7l9-11h-7z"/></svg>
settings.title: No stimulants. No fillers. Ever.
settings.description: Zero caffeine, zero synthetic stimulants. Zero fillers, binders, or excipients. Every capsule contains only active ingredients that benefit the body directly.

settings.title: Physics lab precision
settings.description: The enhancement process uses high-vacuum cold plasma chambers and coherent photonic streams — equipment developed from technology originally used at CERN. This is not supplement manufacturing. It is materials science.

settings.section_heading: Recommended by clinicians who understand the science.

settings.quote_text: Aging isn't just about hormones or metabolism — it's about the subtle decline in cellular communication, mitochondrial efficiency, and energetic coherence. Igniton products stand out because they support all three.
settings.name: Dr. Kenneth Ro, M.D.

settings.quote_text: In my practice, I've seen how inflammation, stress, and cellular dysfunction silently sabotage the aging process. Igniton products offer breakthrough support — combining high-integrity ingredients with enhancement designed to restore cellular function.
settings.name: Dr. Gail King, M.D.
